name: FeiyuTech Vimble 3 Gimbal for Smartphone
description: Capture dynamic vlog footage with your smartphone using the upgraded Feiyu Vimble 3 Telescoping 3-Axis Handheld Gimbal and its motorized pan, tilt, and roll control.

features.Key Features:: Motorized Pan, Tilt, Roll Motion Control | Telescopes out an Additional 7.8" | Landscape and Portrait Modes | Compatible with Smartphones 3.5" Wide | 8.8 oz Load Capacity | USB Type-C Ports | Bluetooth Connectivity | Control via iOS/Android App
features.What’s in the box?: Feiyu Vimble 3 Telescoping 3-Axis Handheld Gimbal for Smartphones | Tripod | USB Type-C Cable | Carrying Bag | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
